title: UK-Japan Memorandum of Cooperation (MoC) on Urban Policy
body: "The scope of cooperation under the MoC is to exchange information and promote domestic policies, research and programmes in the following areas:    national and local systems and practices for urban planning green infrastructure in urban areas, including the promotion of green spaces and energy efficient buildings digitalisation and data in urban areas and their application for spatial planning, including the use of digital twin models, smart city services and data standardisation urban and regional revitalization, including measures to promote inclusiveness and innovation in cities    This MoC came into effect on 18 June 2025 "
